company: Universidad de Costa Rica – Vicerrectoría de Administración
details: Building a workload & work-shift declaration platform: employees declare shift functions, licenses and rest periods while admins manage the university's organizational hierarchy.
React 19 + TypeScript SPA (Vite, Material UI) with client-side PDF export of declarations.
Framework-less REST API in PHP 8.4 on Oracle Database with a clean layered architecture (controllers, services, PDO/OCI repositories with prepared statements).
Token auth with refresh-token rotation, bcrypt, per-IP rate limiting and account lockout; Dockerized monorepo with CI (lint, build, PHPStan).
Designed, built and shipped websites for 10+ clients across legal (VM Legal Group), hospitality and e-commerce.
Mostly React-based; own the full delivery cycle: requirements, development, deployment, SEO and analytics.
Developed a QR-based electronic access control system as part of an academic assistance program.
Identified system requirements through interviews with students and faculty to replace manual device registration.
Designed backend services and a web interface for secure and traceable access management.
Implemented authentication and role-based access to ensure system security.
Built a data-driven platform using agricultural price data from the CNP (Consejo Nacional de Producción).
Cleaned, normalized, and structured large datasets for PostgreSQL and Django integration.
Implemented dynamic visualizations for historical price analysis across multiple fairs.
Collaborated in an academic project between Universidad de Costa Rica and the FAO.
Developed and maintained the hotel website using Wix and custom JavaScript.
Improved SEO strategy, site structure, and metadata to increase online visibility.
Optimized user experience and booking accessibility through UI improvements.
Monitored site analytics to guide performance and engagement enhancements.
